description: Negative-path conformance vectors for A2A#1496 delegation chain validation, CTEF v0.3.2 §A format.

determinism.note: Fixtures pin input.now; validation does not depend on real-time Date.now().
determinism.seed_notation: Transcribed verbatim from commit 381885a. The notation 'XX*32' denotes the single byte 0xXX repeated 32 times to form the 32-byte Ed25519 seed.

format_conformance: Ed25519 over canonicalizeJCS(link minus signature), no sha256 wrap
RFC 8785 JCS with null values preserved
camelCase validityWindow with snake_case not_before / not_after
attribution: Fixture cases contributed by @kenneives (agentgraph-co). Scaffold and validator maintained by APS.
